boundaryStatement: This campaign defines falsifiable reduced-order full-solve gates and reproducible evidence requirements; it is not a physical warp feasibility claim.
notes: No canonical override or promotion implied.
Reportable profile is fail-closed blocked until paired-run, covariance uncertainty, and measurement provenance anchors are present.
